name: Junction City Raspberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain raspberries and reserve 1 cup of the juice.
2. Combine vanilla wafers, sugar, cinnamon, and butter; pat into a 10-inch pie plate. Bake in a 375°F oven for 8 to 10 minutes; cool.
3. Soften gelatin in cold water.
4. Mix reserved raspberry juice, remaining cinnamon, lemon peel, and heat until boiling. Remove from heat; stir in softened gelatin until melted. Chill until mixture just begins to thicken.
5. Whip cream with vanilla; fold into chilled fruit mixture.
6. Pour filling into pie shell. Chill.
7. Decorate with additional whipped cream if desired.
